name: Low-Fat Cheese and Vegetable Omelet (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup diced fresh vegetables (e.g., red pepper, mushrooms, onions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg and egg whites in a mixing bowl.
2. Dice the vegetables and set aside.
3. Spray the pan with vegetable cooking spray.
4. Saute the garlic for 1 minute.
5. Mix the eggs using a whisk or fork.
6. Pour the eggs into the pan over the garlic.
7. Top the eggs with the cup of diced vegetables and shredded cheese.
8. Cook over low heat until the eggs are set.
9. Turn half of the omelet over the other half in the pan.
10. Continue cooking until the omelet is cooked through and the cheese has melted.
11. Garnish the plate with parsley sprigs.
Yield: 1 serving
Calories per serving: 190
Nutrient composition: 3 protein and 1 vegetable (Courtesy of "Weigh Less, Live Longer" by Dr. Lou Aronne)
